trades.reasoning: Score dropped to 35 with bearish MACD crossover and price below SMA-20; rotating into higher-momentum candidates while still slightly profitable.
Top screener score of 100 with RSI in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover, rising histogram, and volume surge confirming institutional interest.
Score 95 with RSI 62.7 in bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover, and volume surge signaling strong near-term upside.
Score 95 with all three momentum signals firing, though RSI at 69.1 is approaching overbought territory so sizing conservatively.

decisions.briefing: Markets are mildly negative today (S&P -0.5%, NASDAQ -0.9%), a neutral backdrop that doesn't warrant going to cash but does favor selectivity. AMZN has turned technically bearish with a score of 35, so I'm rotating those proceeds into MTN, CVLT, and NOK — all sitting in the clean bullish RSI momentum zone with confirmed MACD crossovers and volume backing. This leaves us with 7 positions, still within limits, and a more offense-ready book.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities slipped modestly on April 28 with the S&P 500 down 0.5% and the NASDAQ falling 0.9%, reflecting continued uncertainty around trade policy and mixed corporate earnings signals. Tech-heavy indices led the decline as investors remained cautious ahead of major earnings reports and potential tariff escalation commentary. Defensive rotation was mild, keeping the overall market tone 'neutral' rather than a full risk-off move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股四月二十八日小幅收跌，標普五百指數下跌0.5%，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數跌幅達0.9%，反映市場對貿易政策走向及企業財報的觀望情緒持續升溫。科技類股領跌，投資者在重磅業績公布前普遍保持謹慎，避免過度加倉。整體而言，此次調整屬於溫和的技術性回落，尚未觸發大規模避險情緒。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock's price is moving on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55–70 is the 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock has strong buying pressure without being dangerously overbought. Today's best picks (MTN, CVLT, NOK) all sit in this zone, while many other screener candidates with RSI above 70 were passed over because overbought stocks often pull back sharply.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價漲跌的速度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI落在55至70的區間，代表股票處於「看漲動能區」——買盤力道強勁，但尚未過熱，追高風險相對低。今日精選的MTN、CVLT及NOK均落在此區間；而RSI超過70的股票雖然看似強勢，卻容易在短期出現獲利了結式回調，因此予以迴避。
